With charming 3D graphics and intuitive controls, you must use logic to avoid dead ends and guide your wagons to the finish line. Web Dev https://www.crazygames.com.es/ Can you solve the route before the train leaves the station?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

name: Ronaldo Ball Rush 2026
description: Ronaldo Ball Rush 2026 is a fast-paced endless platform runner where every second counts! Guide Ronaldo as he sprints across floating platforms, collecting footballs to boost your score while carefully avoiding danger. Stay on the platforms, keep your balance, and dont touch the top or bottom of the screen, or your run will end instantly.
instructions: WAD or Arrow keys to play Touch on mobile
